access.guest_fallback_message: Detailed explanations are available for logged-in Saola students only.

q8.explanation: Câu 8 yêu cầu nối thông tin trong câu hỏi với một lựa chọn. Đoạn 2 chứa căn cứ: "Insulin is a hormone made by the pancreas, a gland sitting just below the stomach. It acts like a "key" to open cell walls and allow glucose to enter the cells. If insulin is not present, glucose cannot enter cells and remains inside the blood, a state known as "hyperglycaemia" (high blood sugar).". Lựa chọn E (... allows glucose to be absorbed by cells.) là lựa chọn khớp với chi tiết này.
q8.evidence: Insulin is a hormone made by the pancreas, a gland sitting just below the stomach. It acts like a "key" to open cell walls and allow glucose to enter the cells. If insulin is not present, glucose cannot enter cells and remains inside the blood, a state known as "hyperglycaemia" (high blood sugar)._

q9.explanation: Câu 9 yêu cầu nối thông tin trong câu hỏi với một lựa chọn. Đoạn 3 chứa căn cứ: "This form develops most often in young people but can appear in adults. Type 2 diabetes is the most common form of diabetes. In this version, either the body does not produce enough insulin or cells ignore the signals given by the insulin that would normally "unlock the door" and allow glucose into the cells for transformation into energy.". Lựa chọn C (... generally affects young people.) là lựa chọn khớp với chi tiết này.
q9.evidence: This form develops most often in young people but can appear in adults. Type 2 diabetes is the most common form of diabetes. In this version, either the body does not produce enough insulin or cells ignore the signals given by the insulin that would normally "unlock the door" and allow glucose into the cells for transformation into energy._

q10.explanation: Câu 10 yêu cầu nối thông tin trong câu hỏi với một lựa chọn. Đoạn 6 chứa căn cứ: "Diabetes can cause serious complications for patients. Short-term problems are similar to the symptoms, but long-term high blood sugar levels can lead to heart attacks, strokes, kidney failure, amputations and blindness. Patients whose blood pressure and cholesterol levels are outside the recommended ranges face even higher risks of heart attacks and strokes; in fact two out of three people with diabetes eventually die of these complications.". Lựa chọn G (... do not realise the fact.) là lựa chọn khớp với chi tiết này.
q10.evidence: Diabetes can cause serious complications for patients. Short-term problems are similar to the symptoms, but long-term high blood sugar levels can lead to heart attacks, strokes, kidney failure, amputations and blindness. Patients whose blood pressure and cholesterol levels are outside the recommended ranges face even higher risks of heart attacks and strokes; in fact two out of three people with diabetes eventually die of these complications._

q11.explanation: Câu 11 yêu cầu nối thông tin trong câu hỏi với một lựa chọn. Đoạn 5 chứa căn cứ: "At present there is no cure for diabetes, but there is a huge amount of research being done to find a cure and on ways of providing superior management techniques and products until a cure is found. Whether it is type 1 or type 2 diabetes, the aim of any diabetes treatment is to get a patient's blood glucose levels as close to the non-diabetic range as often as possible. For people with type 1 diabetes, this will mean regular insulin injections as well as leading a healthy lifestyle.". Lựa chọn A (... can be controlled by adopting a healthy lifestyle.) là lựa chọn khớp với chi tiết này.
q11.evidence: At present there is no cure for diabetes, but there is a huge amount of research being done to find a cure and on ways of providing superior management techniques and products until a cure is found. Whether it is type 1 or type 2 diabetes, the aim of any diabetes treatment is to get a patient's blood glucose levels as close to the non-diabetic range as often as possible. For people with type 1 diabetes, this will mean regular insulin injections as well as leading a healthy lifestyle._
